title: Workspace Dependencies And SDK Crate Skeleton
steps: Add workspace members for revdeck-plugin-sdk and later host/test crates as needed.
Add explicit workspace dependencies for toml and semver; only add schemars/jsonschema if manifest schema validation requires it in this slice.
Create revdeck-plugin-sdk crate that depends on revdeck-core, serde, serde_json, thiserror, toml, and semver.
Export placeholder modules for manifest, object_batch, permissions, and validation.
convergence_criteria: cargo metadata recognizes revdeck-plugin-sdk as a workspace package.
revdeck-plugin-sdk compiles with an empty public surface and no circular dependencies.
No source code outside workspace config and new crate skeleton changes behavior.

result.summary: Workspace crate skeleton completed for plugin SDK, host, and tests.
